signals.title: BBVA puts AI at the core of banking with OpenAI
signals.summary: Learn how BBVA scaled ChatGPT Enterprise to 100,000 employees and partnered with OpenAI to accelerate AI-powered banking transformation worldwide.
signals.aiSummary: BBVA银行将ChatGPT企业版扩展至10万员工，与OpenAI合作推动AI银行业务变革

signals.title: OpenAI to acquire Ona
signals.summary: OpenAI plans to acquire Ona to expand Codex with secure, persistent cloud environments, enabling long-running AI agents across enterprise workflows.
signals.aiSummary: OpenAI收购Ona扩展Codex云环境能力，推动长期运行AI智能体在企业工作流中的应用

signals.title: PRC-linked influence operations are targeting AI debates in the US
signals.summary: A new report from OpenAI details PRC-linked influence operations using AI to target U.S. tech debates, data center narratives, tariffs, and false claims about ChatGPT.
signals.aiSummary: OpenAI报告显示中国影响行动利用AI干预美国科技辩论和ChatGPT相关议题

signals.title: What Codex unlocks for Notion
signals.summary: How Notion uses Codex to one-shot specs, build AI Voice Input for the web, and multiply engineering power across small teams.
signals.aiSummary: Notion利用Codex实现规格一键生成、AI语音输入等功能，显著提升小团队工程效率

signals.title: Industrial policy for the Intelligence Age
signals.summary: Explore our ambitious, people-first industrial policy ideas for the AI era—focused on expanding opportunity, sharing prosperity, and building resilient institutions as advanced intelligence evolves.
signals.aiSummary: AI时代工业政策框架，关注机会扩展、繁荣共享和制度建设，为智能革命提供政策指导

signals.title: Confidential submission of draft S-1 to the SEC
signals.summary: OpenAI confirms a confidential S-1 submission to the SEC and has not yet determined timing for further action.
signals.aiSummary: OpenAI向SEC秘密提交S-1上市申请文件，IPO进程启动但时间未定

signals.title: Built to benefit everyone: our plan
signals.summary: A vision for the future of AI, focusing on access, safety, and shared prosperity as OpenAI works to ensure AGI benefits everyone.
signals.aiSummary: OpenAI发布AGI愿景规划，强调安全性和普惠性，将影响AI技术发展方向和应用门槛

signals.title: How Endava is redesigning software delivery around AI agents
signals.summary: Learn how Endava is using AI agents, ChatGPT Enterprise, and Codex to accelerate software delivery, automate workflows, and build an AI-native culture across the enterprise.
signals.aiSummary: Endava通过AI代理和ChatGPT企业版重塑软件交付流程，加速开发自动化

signals.title: Dreaming: Better memory for a more helpful ChatGPT
signals.summary: ChatGPT introduces a new memory system to better remember preferences, keeping context fresh and relevant across conversations.
signals.aiSummary: ChatGPT推出新记忆系统，能跨对话保持用户偏好和上下文，显著提升AI助手体验

signals.title: A blueprint for democratic governance of frontier AI
signals.summary: OpenAI outlines a blueprint for U.S. governance of frontier AI, proposing a federal framework for safety, resilience, and national security.
signals.aiSummary: OpenAI提出美国前沿AI治理蓝图，建议联邦框架规范AI安全与国家安全，将影响AI发展方向

signals.title: OpenAI public policy agenda
signals.summary: OpenAI outlines its public policy agenda for AI, including safety, youth protection, workforce transition, and global standards to ensure AI benefits society.
signals.aiSummary: OpenAI发布公共政策议程，涵盖AI安全、青年保护、劳动力转型和全球标准，将影响AI发展方向

signals.title: A New Era of Discovery: Google Research at I/O 2026
signals.aiSummary: Google在I/O 2026展示研究突破，可能推动AI搜索和交互方式变革
